excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Comparative and Public History lists Main round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Main Round: 31 January 2026 2nd Round: 28 February 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis starting from October 2025 until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. If places are no longer available after the Main Round, the subsequent applications received may not be considered.
